prompt: Create a quarterly business review for Q4 2025 showing revenue of $45M (up 12%), costs of $32M, and 3 strategic priorities for Q1
Build a board presentation about our companys ESG progress with carbon reduction metrics, diversity stats, and governance improvements
Create a department budget review showing planned vs actual spend across 6 cost centers with variance analysis
Make a monthly operations dashboard with 4 KPIs: uptime 99.7%, incidents down 23%, MTTR improved 40%, customer satisfaction 4.6/5
Present our company restructuring plan: merging 3 divisions into 2, timeline over 6 months, impact on 200 employees
Create an investor update covering revenue growth, ARR trajectory, burn rate, and runway with 18 months of data
Build a risk assessment presentation with a 4x4 risk matrix showing 8 identified risks across likelihood and impact
Present IT infrastructure modernization results: cloud migration 75% complete, cost savings $2.3M, remaining timeline
Create a vendor evaluation comparing 3 CRM platforms across 8 criteria with scoring and recommendation
Annual company all-hands presentation: achievements, challenges, employee milestones, vision for next year
Pitch our SaaS analytics platform to a Fortune 500 retail company. Show pain points, solution, ROI of 300%, 3 customer case studies
Create a competitive comparison deck: our product vs 2 competitors across 10 features, pricing, and support
Build a customer success story: client reduced operational costs by 40% using our platform over 12 months
Pitch a consulting engagement: problem diagnosis, proposed approach, team, timeline, investment of $500K
Create a product demo deck with 5 key features, each with a screenshot placeholder and benefit statement
Build a pricing proposal deck: 3 tiers (Starter $99, Pro $299, Enterprise custom) with feature comparison
ROI calculator presentation: show how switching from competitor saves $1.2M over 3 years with waterfall breakdown
Partnership proposal: joint go-to-market opportunity, combined TAM of $5B, complementary capabilities
Renewal presentation for existing client: usage metrics, value delivered, expansion opportunities, new pricing
Create a brief 5-slide elevator pitch for a new AI-powered HR tool targeting mid-market companies
Sprint review presentation: 12 stories completed, 3 carried over, velocity trend chart, demo highlights
Program status dashboard: 5 workstreams with RAG status, key milestones, risks, and decisions needed
Post-mortem for a failed product launch: timeline of events, root causes, lessons learned, preventive actions
Migration project update: 60% of 500 servers migrated, blockers, revised timeline, resource needs
New office construction project status: phases, budget tracking ($15M of $20M spent), completion timeline
Software release readiness review: feature completion, test coverage, known bugs, go/no-go recommendation
Cross-functional initiative update: 4 teams contributing, dependencies map, critical path items
Agile transformation progress: teams converted, velocity improvements, satisfaction survey results
Data center decommission status: 80 of 120 racks removed, cost savings realized, remaining schedule
Project kickoff deck: scope, team introductions, timeline, communication plan, success criteria
CEO presentation to the board: company performance vs plan, strategic pivots, capital allocation decisions
M&A target analysis: company profile, financial metrics, strategic fit score, integration risks, valuation range
Market entry strategy: 3 target markets ranked by attractiveness, entry mode, investment required, expected returns
Cost optimization findings: $8M savings identified across procurement, headcount, and technology. Quick wins vs long-term
Digital transformation roadmap: current maturity, target state, 3-year phased plan, investment of $25M
Competitive landscape briefing: 5 competitors mapped on market share vs growth, our positioning, threats
Talent strategy presentation: attrition trends, hiring plan, skills gaps, retention initiatives, budget impact
Supply chain resilience report: single-source risks, geographic concentration, mitigation recommendations
Customer segmentation analysis: 4 segments with size, growth, profitability, and strategic priority ranking
Quarterly earnings preparation deck: revenue, EBITDA, guidance, talking points for analyst questions
New product announcement: features, pricing, availability date, target audience, go-to-market plan
Product roadmap for next 4 quarters with features grouped by theme, effort estimates, and dependencies
Feature prioritization presentation: 15 features scored on impact vs effort, recommended top 5
Beta launch results: 500 users, NPS 72, top feature requests, bugs found, launch readiness assessment
Platform architecture overview for a technical audience: microservices, data flow, integration points
Product discontinuation announcement: reasons, migration path, timeline, customer communication plan
API product launch: endpoints, authentication, rate limits, pricing tiers, developer onboarding flow
Mobile app redesign proposal: current UX issues, new designs, A/B test plan, success metrics
Hardware product spec sheet presentation: dimensions, materials, performance benchmarks, certifications
Product comparison for internal decision: build vs buy analysis across cost, timeline, risk, and capability
Onboarding presentation for new engineers: team structure, tech stack, dev workflow, first-week checklist
Security awareness training: phishing examples, password policy, incident reporting, 5 key behaviors
Leadership development workshop: 4 modules on communication, delegation, feedback, and conflict resolution
Data literacy training: what is data analytics, key metrics, how to read dashboards, hands-on exercises
Sales methodology training: qualification framework, discovery questions, objection handling, closing techniques
Compliance training: regulatory requirements, dos and donts, case studies, quiz questions
Project management fundamentals: waterfall vs agile, planning tools, risk management, stakeholder communication
Technical deep-dive on Kubernetes: architecture, pods, services, deployments, scaling, monitoring
Customer service excellence: empathy techniques, escalation procedures, SLA management, quality metrics
Change management workshop: ADKAR model, stakeholder mapping, communication plan, resistance strategies
Marketing dashboard: website traffic 250K visits, conversion rate 3.2%, CAC $85, LTV $2400, channel breakdown
Financial dashboard: revenue, gross margin, EBITDA, cash flow, debt ratio, all with YoY comparison
Sales pipeline dashboard: $12M pipeline, 45 opportunities, stage conversion rates, forecast vs quota
HR metrics dashboard: headcount 450, turnover 12%, time-to-hire 35 days, engagement score 4.1/5, diversity breakdown
Product analytics dashboard: DAU 15K, retention curve, feature adoption rates, error rates, load times
Supply chain dashboard: on-time delivery 94%, inventory turnover 8x, supplier lead times, quality defect rate 0.3%
Customer health dashboard: NPS 65, CSAT 4.3, support tickets by category, resolution times, churn risk segments
Manufacturing KPIs: OEE 82%, yield 97.5%, downtime hours, maintenance backlog, safety incidents
Energy consumption dashboard: kWh by building, solar generation, carbon footprint trend, cost per sqft
Executive summary dashboard: top 6 KPIs across finance, customers, operations, people with traffic light status
3-year corporate strategy: vision, strategic pillars, key initiatives per pillar, success metrics
Technology roadmap: current state, target architecture, migration phases, investment timeline
Go-to-market strategy for APAC expansion: market sizing, channel strategy, pricing localization, hiring plan
Innovation portfolio: 12 initiatives mapped on horizon framework (H1 core, H2 adjacent, H3 transformational)
Sustainability strategy: 2030 targets, current baseline, reduction pathways, investment requirements
Platform strategy: build ecosystem with 3rd party developers, API monetization, marketplace vision
Pricing strategy review: current vs proposed pricing, elasticity analysis, competitor benchmarks, revenue impact
Workforce planning: skills needed in 3 years, gap analysis, build vs buy vs borrow decisions
Channel strategy optimization: direct vs partner vs digital, margin analysis, recommended mix shift
Data strategy: governance framework, data mesh architecture, literacy program, 2-year implementation plan
Team introduction: 8 members with photo placeholders, roles, fun facts, and team charter
Department reorganization: current vs new structure, role changes, transition timeline
Hiring plan presentation: 25 open positions across 4 departments, timeline, budget, employer branding strategy
Team retrospective results: what went well, what to improve, action items with owners and deadlines
Culture survey results: 85% response rate, scores across 6 dimensions, trend vs last year, action plan
Brand guidelines presentation: logo usage, color palette, typography, tone of voice, do/dont examples
Event planning proposal: venue options, agenda, speakers, budget breakdown, sponsorship tiers
Social media campaign results: impressions 2.5M, engagement rate 4.7%, top posts, sentiment analysis
Conference sponsorship deck: audience demographics, sponsorship tiers (Gold/Silver/Bronze), booth map, ROI for sponsors
Podcast launch presentation: concept, target audience, content calendar, production workflow, growth projections
Rebranding proposal: current vs new brand identity, rationale, implementation timeline, budget
System architecture diagram: frontend, API gateway, microservices, databases, message queues, monitoring
Incident response presentation: timeline, impact (45 min downtime, 10K users affected), root cause, prevention
Database migration plan: source MySQL, target PostgreSQL, data mapping, testing strategy, rollback plan
Performance benchmark results: comparing 3 solutions on throughput, latency, memory usage, cost
Security audit findings: 3 critical, 7 high, 12 medium vulnerabilities with remediation priority and timeline
API documentation overview: 5 endpoint groups, authentication flow, rate limits, error codes, SDK support
Cloud cost analysis: AWS spend breakdown by service, optimization opportunities totaling $180K annual savings
ML model evaluation: accuracy 94.2%, precision/recall curves, confusion matrix, comparison to baseline, deployment plan
Zero-trust security architecture: network segmentation, identity verification, device trust, monitoring layers
